_meta.purpose: Authority file seed for thinker resolution. Phase 0.2 byline sweep + Phase 0.3 Opus clustering refine this. Metadata extraction prompts resolve bylines against the byline_lookup map. Entries with confidence: canonical are trusted; medium-confidence entries are candidate names that need cluster-collapse (e.g., 'MR Masani' will collapse into 'minoo-masani' after Phase 0.3).
_meta.schema_note: Each entry follows the thinkerName shape from apps/site/src/content.config.ts.

thinkers.brief_bio: Sharad Anantrao Joshi (born 1935) is the founder of Shetkari Sanghatana and Swatantra Bharat Paksha party; and has served as a Member of Parliament.

sources: Recurrent FFE epigraph subject (7 PDFs); editorial: confirm canonical-vs-high tier
